an8.37:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these eight gifts of a good person.What eight?(1) He gives what is pure; (2) he gives what is excellent; (3) he gives a timely gift; (4) he gives what is allowable; (5) he gives after investigation; (6) he gives often; (7) while giving he settles his mind in confidence; and (8) having given, he is elated. These are the eight gifts of a good person."
an8.37:1.0.2: He gives what is pure and excellent,allowable drinks and food at the proper time;he gives gifts often to fertile fields of merit,to those who lead the spiritual life.
an8.37:1.0.3: He does not feel regret,having given away many material things.Those with deep insight praisethe gifts given in this way.
an8.37:1.0.4: Having thus practiced charitywith a mind freely generous,one intelligent and wise, rich in faith,is reborn in a pleasant, unafflicted world.
